news.title: UP-RERA cautions buyers against ‘assured returns’ schemes, flags misleading real estate ads
news.para: UP-RERA has warned homebuyers against investing based on offers such as assured returns, pre-EMI schemes and fixed rental income, stating such promises lack legal validity unless included in RERA-approved agreements. The authority said strict action will be taken against misleading advertisements.

news.title: Halt operation if clearance missing: NGT orders HSPCB checks on Rewari brick kiln
news.para: The National Green Tribunal has ordered the Haryana Pollution Control Board to shut down a brick kiln in Rewari within a week if it lacks a valid Consent to Operate. This directive follows allegations that the unit flouted environmental norms and continued operating despite a district closure order and cancellation of its consent.

news.title: Aditya Birla Housing Finance allots shares worth ₹2,750 crore to Indriya
news.para: Aditya Birla Housing Finance has raised about ₹2,750 crore through a preferential allotment to Indriya, an Advent International entity. Following the transaction, the investor will hold a 14.29% stake, reducing Aditya Birla Capital’s holding to 85.5%.

news.title: NDR InvIT acquires two warehousing assets in Kochi & Coimbatore for ₹260 crore
news.para: NDR InvIT Trust has broadened its horizons by acquiring two functional warehousing facilities located in Kochi and Coimbatore for an impressive ₹260 crore. This strategic acquisition contributes an additional 0.79 million sq ft of leasable area to their already robust portfolio. With this enhancement, the Trust’s overall operating space reaches a commendable 22.

news.title: Shree Cement, Ansal Housing receive tax demands; Kesoram’s liability reduced to ₹6 crore
news.para: Shree Cement and Ansal Housing have received tax demand orders from GST and Income Tax authorities, respectively, while Kesoram Industries said its earlier tax demand has been significantly reduced. All three companies plan to challenge the orders and said there is no material impact on operations.

news.title: NBCC sells commercial space worth ₹5,779 crore at Sarojini Nagar project
news.para: NBCC has completed an e-auction for commercial space at Bharat Business Park in Sarojini Nagar, New Delhi. The auction generated a significant ₹5,779 crore. This sale will fund ongoing redevelopment projects and meet financial commitments. The average sale rate saw a notable increase over the reserve price.

news.title: Telangana RERA launches public grievance, guidance cell to strengthen stakeholder facilitation
news.para: Telangana RERA has introduced an innovative Public Grievance and Guidance Cell, transforming the way residents interact with the real estate landscape. This new platform serves as a beacon of support, offering clear insights into the entitlements and obligations of both buyers and sellers.

news.title: Alt Capital launches third real estate AIF, targets ₹1,000 crore corpus
news.para: Alt Capital has launched AltCap Yield Fund III (AYF III), aiming to raise ₹1,000 crore with a ₹200 crore green shoe option. The fund will invest in pre-leased office and warehousing assets across key markets such as Bengaluru, NCR and Pune.

news.title: Ahmedabad civic body penalizes four construction sites for environmental violations
news.para: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation's North Zone estate department fined four construction sites between Rs 25,000 and Rs 2 lakh for environmental violations. Penalties were issued for failing to install green nets, encroaching on roads, and causing air pollution. The department also removed illegal constructions from reserved plots in Gota and Jagatpur.

news.title: Over 30 buildings razed for road widening in Varanasi
news.para: Demolition of portions of 32 buildings in Varanasi's Baulia Lehartara area cleared land for the Mohansarai-Cantt railway station road project. The Public Works Department resumed work after the Allahabad High Court allowed demolition following the submission of land ownership documents, ensuring the Rs 410 crore project stays on schedule.

news.title: Online khata correction facility in Bengaluru soon
news.para: The Greater Bengaluru Authority is set to launch an online khata correction facility, simplifying property record updates for citizens. This new system will allow corrections to details like location and ward number, excluding owner names and property measurements.

news.title: Lucknow development body to offer 630 flats in Atalnagar scheme
news.para: Lucknow Development Authority (LDA) will open registrations for 630 budget housing flats under the Atalnagar scheme from April 18 to May 17. The project in Devpur Para offers one and two-bedroom units priced from Rs 9.82 lakh, with amenities like water, electricity, and parking. A lottery will be used for allotment.

news.title: Suraj Estate Developers acquires land for ₹18 crore in Dadar West, Mumbai
news.para: Suraj Estate Developers has acquired a land parcel in Mumbai’s Dadar West for a total consideration of ₹18 crore, including cash and area sharing. The company plans to redevelop the plot with an estimated gross development value of around ₹100 crore.

news.title: A-khata maze: High costs, missing paperwork stall approvals in Bengaluru
news.para: Bengaluru's A-khata conversion process is struggling, with only 818 properties granted the status in six months.  Deep structural issues, including documentation gaps and significant financial burdens for property owners, are hindering progress.  Despite over 8 lakh B-khata properties, only a fraction have applied, with most applications still pending due to these challenges.

news.title: Building malls now needs deeper pockets as construction costs rose 13.9%
news.para: Construction costs for malls have surged by a record 13.9% over two years, driven by enhanced designs and MEP expenses. Luxury and mid-market housing also saw significant cost increases due to improved amenities. Developers are now prioritizing efficiency and planning amidst rising development activity and input volatility.

news.title: YEIDA extends deadline for FinTech hub application
news.para: The Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority (YEIDA) has extended the application deadline for its 500-acre FinTech hub to April 29. This revision aims to attract more global investors and industry stakeholders attending the upcoming Money Alpha 360° financial summit. The hub will accommodate core financial services, IT, and digital operations, fostering innovation in digital banking and electronic payments.

news.title: Delhi LG visits Swabhiman Apartments, orders quick fix to residents’ grievances
news.para: Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu visited Swabhiman Apartments to gather feedback from residents on living conditions and civic amenities. He directed concerned departments to prioritize addressing issues like seepage, garbage management, and lift malfunctions. The visit highlighted the project's aim to provide dignified housing under the "Jahan Jhuggi, Wahin Makan" initiative.
